Relevant summary

- The repository presents Silero Models as pretrained text-to-speech models.
- The README describes three usage paths: PyTorch Hub, pip package, and manual caching/loading.
- The README says models are downloaded on demand and can be cached manually.
- The README notes that Russian support includes automated stress and homograph handling.
- The README links the main TTS metadata into a models.yml file for newer versions and checkpoints.
